task: Move the pot to the bottom middle of stove
raw:
**SCENE ANALYSIS - A stainless steel pot sits on a black stovetop. The pot has a handle and a body. The stovetop has a flat surface. STRATEGY - First, reach for the pot's handle to grasp it. Then, lift the pot and transport it to the bottom middle of the stovetop. Finally, place the pot on the stovetop. Failure modes include dropping the pot during transport or misplacing it. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1: Reach for the pot's handle to grasp it. Step 2: Grasp the handle to lift the pot. Step 3: Transport the pot to the bottom middle of the stovetop. Step 4: Place the pot on the stovetop.**
Goal: on(pot, stovetop); stable(pot)
Scene: pot, stovetop
Step 1: reach(pot)
  affordance_region: the handle of the pot
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, pot, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, pot) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(pot)
  affordance_region: the handle of the pot
  contact: holding(pot) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(pot)
Step 3: transport(pot -> stovetop)
  affordance_region: the bottom middle area of the stovetop
  spatial: above(pot, stovetop, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(pot)
  done_when: above(pot, stovetop, 0.05)
Step 4: place(pot -> stovetop)
  affordance_region: the bottom middle area of the stovetop
  contact: surface_contact(pot, stovetop) [completion]; released(pot) [completion]
  pose: stable(pot) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(pot, stovetop) AND released(pot)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the bottom middle area of the stovetop
the bottom middle area of the stovetop
